titleStmt.title: SII 17.460: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 460. (A.R. No. 429 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 6(1/2) mā and kīḻ of 3/4 (vēli) of land by Uyyavandāṉ alias Tiruvaraṅgamārāyaṉ, one of the niyāyattār of Periñāru in Rājēndrachōḷa vaḷanāḍu, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu Uḍaiyār. The gift land was made over to Śrīkṛishṇa Bhaṭṭa and others of Anapāya-chaturvēdimangalam who undertook to maintain the lamp with the balance after paying the kaḍamai (tax) on the lands.
In detailing the boundaries of the gift land, the record mentions Vikramaśōḻaṉ Kaḍambūr iraṇḍā[ṁ kaṇṇāṟu].

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku Uṭai
yār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku rācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu periñāril Irukkum niyāyat
tāril Uyyavantāṉāṉa tiruvaraṅka mārāyaṉeṉ nāṉ vaitta tiruviḷakku Oṉ
ṟukku Iṉṉāṭṭu Aṉapāyac caruppetimaṅkalattu ṟattu śrī kiruṣṇapaṭṭa
ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal Innāyaṉār tirunāmattu vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa nilamūrp perāṟṟu va
ṭakaraiyil niḻai Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ catira kku kiḻpāṟkellai vik
kiramacoḻaṉ kaṭampūr Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellaiyum melpāṟ
kellaiyum tirunāmattukkāṇi kku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai
vikkiramacoḻaṉ kaṭampūr Iraṇṭāṅ ṟukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉai
nilam Āṟumāvaraiyiṉ kiḻ mukkālum kaṭamai Iṟuttu mikutikoṇṭu cantirā
tittavarai cellak kaṭavatāka
Digital edition of SII 17.460 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
